zh.Aldwark, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾阿爾德瓦可
zh.Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯普洛特布盧
zh.Spotbrough, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John FitzWilliam於1397年5月27日出生在英國越可爾斯普洛特布盧時，他的父親Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough19歲，母親Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster21歲。他於1410年1月19日與Margaret Clarell在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1421年9月17日享年24歲。

zh-hans.Aldwark, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾阿爾德瓦可
zh-hans.Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾斯普洛特布盧
zh-hans.Spotbrough, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John FitzWilliam于1397年5月27日出生在英国越可爾斯普洛特布盧时，他的父亲Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough19岁，母亲Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster21岁。他于1410年1月19日与Margaret Clarell在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1421年9月17日享年24岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John FitzWilliam was born on 27 May 1397, in Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough, was 19 and his mother, Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster, was 21. He married Margaret Clarell on 19 January 1410, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 17 September 1421, at the age of 24.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John FitzWilliam est né le 27 mai 1397, à Sprotbrough, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Clarell le 19 janvier 1410, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 17 septembre 1421, à l’âge de 24 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John FitzWilliam am 27. Mai 1397 in Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough 19 und seine Mutter Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster 21. Er hat am 19. Januar 1410 in England Margaret Clarell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. September 1421 im Alter von 24 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John FitzWilliam è nato il il 27 maggio 1397 nel Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Clarell il 19 gennaio 1410, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 settembre 1421, all'età di 24 anni.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Aldwark, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアアルドワーク
ja.Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアスプロトブロウ
ja.Spotbrough, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアスプロトブロウ アンド クウスウオルス
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John FitzWilliamが1397年5月27日にイギリスヨークシュアイアスプロトブロウで生まれた時，父Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbroughは19歳，母Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminsterは21歳であった。1410年1月19日にイギリスでMargaret Clarellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1421年9月17日に24歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John FitzWilliam(이)가 1397년 5월 27일 영국 요르크실르 스프로트브루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1410년 1월 19일 영국에서 Margaret Clarell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1421년 9월 17일 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.27 May 1397–17 September 1421: 1397 оны Тавдугаар сарын 27–1421 оны Есдүгээр сарын 17

pt.27 May 1397–17 September 1421: 27 de maio de 1397–17 de setembro de 1421
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John FitzWilliam nasceu em 27 de maio de 1397, em Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Clarell em 19 de janeiro de 1410, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de setembro de 1421, com 24 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John FitzWilliam родился 27 мая 1397 г. в местности спротброую, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Clarell 19 января 1410 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 17 сентября 1421 г. в возрасте 24 лет.

es.27 May 1397–17 September 1421: 27 de mayo de 1397–17 de septiembre de 1421
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John FitzWilliam nació el 27 de mayo de 1397, en Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret Clarell el 19 de enero de 1410, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 17 de septiembre de 1421, a la edad de 24 años.
